description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named SonarCloud that runs on push events to the master branch, ignoring certain file paths, on pull request target events, and on a scheduled basis. The workflow should use a single windows-latest job to check out the code, set up environment variables, cache Sonar analysis, set up MSBuild, fetch and build with Build-Wrapper, install OpenCppCoverage, run tests, set up JDK 11, fetch SonarScanner, and analyze with SonarScanner, using various secrets and environment variables to authenticate and configure the process.
